symbols: armillary sphere — the study of celestial mechanics and the heavenly bodies
open book — the theoretical knowledge underlying astronomical observation
Gothic architectural niche — the university or cathedral school context of medieval learning
description: A fresco detail showing a seated figure in a white robe within an ornate Gothic architectural niche with pointed arches, colored columns, and decorative tracery. The figure, shown in profile facing right, holds an open book in the lap and gestures with the right hand toward a golden armillary sphere mounted on a tall stand. The figure wears a decorative headband or crown. The architectural frame is rendered in pink, grey, and green stone tones with Gothic detailing. The overall palette is warm with gold accents.
